summary: Invoice Entry (Execution Ledger) module fully tested. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend UI working with Purchase Type toggle showing correct dropdowns (Liability for Credit, Cashbook for Cash). Liabilities dropdown is populated correctly from project liabilities.
passed_tests: GET /api/finance/execution-ledger/categories - returns 7 categories
POST /api/finance/execution-ledger - create invoice entry with credit purchase type
POST /api/finance/execution-ledger - create invoice entry with cash purchase type
POST /api/finance/execution-ledger - linked_liability_id saved for credit purchase
POST /api/finance/execution-ledger - linked_cashbook_id saved for cash purchase
GET /api/finance/execution-ledger/project/{project_id} - returns entries with summary
PUT /api/finance/execution-ledger/{execution_id} - update entry with audit history
PUT /api/finance/execution-ledger/{execution_id} - edit_history records changes
DELETE /api/finance/execution-ledger/{execution_id} - blocked for linked entries
DELETE /api/finance/execution-ledger/{execution_id} - succeeds for unlinked entries
GET /api/finance/liabilities?project_id= - returns project liabilities
Frontend: Add Invoice Entry modal opens correctly
Frontend: VendorSelect component works
Frontend: Purchase Type toggle (Credit/Cash) works
Frontend: Credit Purchase shows 'Link to Liability' dropdown
Frontend: Cash Purchase shows 'Link to Cashbook Payment' dropdown
Frontend: Liability dropdown populated with project liabilities (ABC Furniture Suppliers - ₹1,50,000 remaining)
Frontend: Edit Invoice Entry modal opens with pre-filled data
Frontend: Edit modal shows warning for linked invoices
Frontend: Invoice Entry summary cards show category totals
Frontend: Invoice list shows purchase type badges (Credit/Cash)
Frontend: Invoice list shows linkage status (Liability Linked/Payment Linked)
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Liabilities prop is correctly passed from ProjectFinanceDetail.jsx to ExecutionLedger.jsx
VERIFIED: Purchase Type toggle conditionally shows correct dropdown (Liability for Credit, Cashbook for Cash)
VERIFIED: Liability dropdown is populated with project-specific liabilities
VERIFIED: Edit functionality works with audit history tracking
VERIFIED: Delete protection works for linked invoices
seed_data_creation: Test entries created and cleaned up during testing. Existing entries: ABC Plywood Traders (₹68,500), old entries from previous testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Invoice Entry (Execution Ledger) module fully tested. Key fix verified: ProjectFinanceDetail.jsx now fetches and passes liabilities to ExecutionLedger component. The liability dropdown in the Add/Edit Invoice Entry modal is populated correctly when Credit Purchase is selected. All CRUD operations working. Test project: proj_17942869 (sharan - Interior Project) has one liability: ABC Furniture Suppliers (₹1,50,000 remaining).
